question: Is there a circular cobblestone fountain pool roughly five meters in diameter in the foreground center?
Is the water in the fountain crystal clear, revealing scattered gold and silver wishing coins on the bottom?
Are there approximately seven or eight oval emerald-green lily pads floating on the water surface?
Are there exactly three pink-white water lilies floating on the surface?
Is there a bronze dolphin sculpture standing at the center of the fountain?
Are there exactly three water jets spraying from the dolphin's mouth and tail?
Is there a balding middle-aged man wearing a gray suit and holding a black briefcase in the foreground left?
Is the man in the gray suit looking down at a phone while walking?
Are there exactly two little girls in the foreground right, one in a pale yellow dress and the other in a mint green dress?
Are the two little girls leaning over the fountain edge reaching their hands toward the water?
Is a mother standing behind the girls wearing a white sun-protection jacket and sunglasses?
Is the mother smiling with her hands on her hips?
Is the midground pedestrian plaza paved with dark red brick?
Are there exactly six deep green boxwood trees trimmed into spherical shapes in the midground?
Is each boxwood tree surrounded by a ring of light gray stone benches?
Is there a young man wearing a red baseball cap pushing a white ice cream cart in the center of the plaza?
Do the colorful menu stickers on the cart legibly read "Vanilla/Chocolate/Strawberry $5"?
Are there exactly three children queuing at the ice cream cart?
Are there exactly four cylindrical dark green cast iron trash bins at the plaza edge?
Are there two rows of rectangular wooden planters filled with red petunias and white baby's breath?
Is there a neoclassical off-white stone building in the background with exactly six Corinthian columns?
Is a dark blue flag with a gold heraldic shield hanging between the columns?
Are the golden letters "MUNICIPAL CULTURAL CENTER" clearly visible and correctly spelled above the main entrance?
Are there exactly two white marble lion statues flanking the building entrance?
Is the sky bright light blue with a white commercial airliner in the upper right corner?
Does the airliner have exactly two long white contrails?
Are there any obvious distortions in human limbs or faces (e.g., extra fingers, twisted arms)?
